audit_items.proof_trace: At line 437, `availableBalance` is directly assigned `IERC20(asset).balanceOf(address(this))`, making the equality trivially true by definition. No separate reserved/locked balance tracker exists in the contract — all state variables (`s_assetParams`, `s_auctionStarts`, `s_entered`, etc.) track configuration and control flow, not balance reservations. GPV2CompatibleAuction grants an ERC20 approval to the CowSwap vault relayer at auction start but ERC20 approvals do not reserve tokens, so `balanceOf` always reflects the full liquid balance available.
